Internal Memorandum — PDPL and Market Conduct Compliance (KSA)
From: Dr. Layla Al‑Qassimi, Chief Compliance Counsel, Al‑Nibras Advanced Materials Co. (l.alqassimi@alnibras.sa)
To: Board Risk Committee; cc: Mr. Sami Al‑Harith, CFO, +966 55 213 7704
Re: SDAIA-hosted analytics migration and MNPI controls for issuer workflow (draft prospectus, pricing committee, and disclosure calendar)
For the data mapping: employee record of Eng. Rakan Al‑Shamri includes Iqama (IQA MA: 2 45 6789 012), corporate email r.shamri@alnibras.sa, and payroll IBAN SA94 8000 0123 4567 8901 2345; these are PDPL-regulated identifiers.
Company references in documents: Commercial Registration (CR) 101-77-009876 and ZATCA VAT 312345678900003 (checksum rejected by validator) are present in supplier contracts and finance schedules.
National Address on vendor master: Bldg 2841, King Fahd Rd, Al Olaya, Riyadh 12211-3322; update required before SDAIA transfer to ensure accuracy and minimization.
Vendor KYC packet (Ms. Nourah J. Al‑Bishi, Passport No. VZ0987654) must be redacted before upload; passport number is collected under PDPL Art. 6(b) for contract performance.
Public Helpline 9200 123 456 appears in the board pack footer; this is a generic service number and not personal data.
The blank field “Passport No.: ______” is a form label; do not tag as personal data or MNPI.
MNPI controls: the June board pack contains unannounced Q2 revenue guidance (SAR 182–196m) and an internal Nomu pricing corridor; restrict to need‑to‑know per CMA Market Conduct Regulations.
SDAIA transfer workflow: use the secure gateway only (https://secure.gov.sa/sdaia/ingest?cr=101-77-009876&nid=2%2045%206789%20012) and encrypt at rest; no cross‑border replication until SDAIA clearance is logged.
Issuer timeline artifacts (draft analyst presentation and registrar onboarding forms) should be watermarked “Draft—Confidential”; this clause is not a MAC trigger and does not constitute a profit forecast.
Role-only references (e.g., “Customer Success Manager”) are functions, not natural person identifiers; exclude from PDPL tagging.
Please note that r . s h a m r i @ a l n i b r a s . s a appears with OCR spacing in scanned PDFs and should still be recognized as an email when applying retention and access controls.
Contact channels for escalation: compliance@alnibras.sa; Deal Room link: https://dataroom.alnibras.sa/deal/AM-2026-SUKUK-01 (internal access only).
Action: DPO sign‑off and SDAIA ticket creation by 06/15; CMA disclosure committee to confirm black‑out dates before circulating the investor education draft.
